dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Back-office entry point: choose a section from the left menu or from the shortcuts below.

shortcuts.parkItems: Manage attractions, shops, restaurants and services.
shortcuts.operators: Maintain the operators linked to parks.
shortcuts.images: Review media, logos and site visuals.
shortcuts.data: Monitor imports, sources and data processing.
shortcuts.founders: Maintain founders and biographies linked to parks.
shortcuts.localizedContent: Quickly import localized texts through JSON after selecting a target.
shortcuts.parkGraphUpserts: Preview then apply a full or partial park graph JSON.
shortcuts.seoSitemaps: Manage the sitemap index, XML sections, stats and IndexNow.
